segments.text: listen, and then answer the following question.

translations.zh-Hans: 听录音，然后回答下面的问题。

segments.text: How much of each year do spiders spend killing insects?

translations.zh-Hans: 蜘蛛每年有多长时间都在捕杀昆虫？

segments.text: Why, you may wonder, should spiders be our friends?

translations.zh-Hans: 你也许会问，蜘蛛为什么会是我们的朋友？

segments.text: Because they destroy so many insects, and insects include some of the greatest enemies of the human race.

translations.zh-Hans: 因为它们消灭大量昆虫，而昆虫中有些是人类最大的敌人。

segments.text: Insects would make it impossible for us to live in the world.

translations.zh-Hans: 如果没有蜘蛛，昆虫会使我们无法在这个世界上生存。

segments.text: They would devour all our crops and kill our flocks and herds, if it were not for the protection we get from insect-eating animals.

translations.zh-Hans: 若不是食虫动物为我们提供保护，昆虫会吞噬所有庄稼，杀死成群的牛羊。

segments.text: We owe a lot to the birds and beasts who eat insects, but all of them put together kill only a fraction of the number destroyed by spiders.

translations.zh-Hans: 我们非常感激食虫的鸟兽，但它们全部加起来，消灭的昆虫也只及蜘蛛所灭数量的一小部分。

segments.text: Moreover, unlike some of the other insect-eaters, spiders never do the least harm to us or our belongings.

translations.zh-Hans: 此外，与其他一些食虫动物不同，蜘蛛从不对我们或我们的财物造成丝毫伤害。

segments.text: Spiders are not insects, as many people think, nor even nearly related to them.

translations.zh-Hans: 蜘蛛并不像许多人以为的那样属于昆虫，甚至与昆虫也没有近缘关系。

segments.text: One can tell the difference almost at a glance, for a spider always has eight legs and an insect never more than six.

translations.zh-Hans: 几乎一眼就能看出区别，因为蜘蛛总有八条腿，而昆虫最多只有六条。

segments.text: How many spiders are engaged in this work on our behalf?

translations.zh-Hans: 有多少蜘蛛在替我们做这项工作呢？

segments.text: One authority on spiders made a census of the spiders in a grass field in the south of England, and he estimated that there were more than two million, two hundred fifty thousand in one acre.

translations.zh-Hans: 一位蜘蛛专家普查了英格兰南部一块草地上的蜘蛛，估计每英亩有二百二十五万只以上。

segments.text: That is something like six million spiders of different kinds on a football pitch.

translations.zh-Hans: 这相当于一个足球场上约有六百万只不同种类的蜘蛛。

segments.text: Spiders are busy for at least half the year in killing insects.

translations.zh-Hans: 蜘蛛每年至少有半年忙于捕杀昆虫。

segments.text: It is impossible to make more than the wildest guess at how many they kill, but they are hungry creatures, not content with only three meals a day.

translations.zh-Hans: 它们究竟杀死多少昆虫，只能作最粗略的猜测；但蜘蛛十分贪食，绝不会满足于一日三餐。

segments.text: It has been estimated that the weight of all the insects destroyed by spiders in Britain in one year would be greater than the total weight of all the human beings in the country.

translations.zh-Hans: 据估计，英国蜘蛛一年消灭的全部昆虫，其总重量超过全国所有人口的总重量。
